title: He Led Congo for 18 Years. Now, Joseph Kabila Is a Hunted Man.
summary_full: Joseph Kabila, the former president, faces the death penalty after the government convicted him of treason last year. He says the charges are bogus.
summary_public: Joseph Kabila, the former president, faces the death penalty after the government convicted him of treason last year. He says the charges are bogus.
